CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend Action
Off Calendar Mar-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SIMON BURNS' Motion To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend Action.

Defendant Simon Burns' motion to set aside default and for leave to defend action is granted. The default is set aside and Mr. Burns must file a response to the complaint no later than April 11, 2025. Mr. Burns has satisfactorily shown that he did not have actual notice of the service on him by publication and that his lack of notice was not due to any effort on his part to avoid service or any other conduct that would make it inequitable to grant this motion. Granting the motion is in accord with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
